channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: AI salaries in Singapore rise as demand for talent grows, PhD not always required - The Straits Times

Oil Rises on Escalating Supply Disruption Concerns - WSJ
I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works - The Verge

From The Athletic: Victor Wembanyama's monster performance in Game 3 stunned the Knicks home crowd and vaulted him into lofty company among New York sports villains. Wembanyama presented himself as a viable destructor of dreams. https://nyti.ms/4x - facebook.com
